artifacts.name: exportService
artifacts.description: Export/Import service: exportModelJSON (versioned JSON download) and importModelJSON (validation + sanitization). FR-SHARE-001, NFR-SEC-002.

artifacts.name: ActionBar
artifacts.description: ActionBar with Export JSON (btn-export) and Import JSON (btn-import) buttons. Handles FileReader, error notification, scene preservation on import error.

artifacts.name: useBrickStore
artifacts.description: Zustand store with setBricks and setNotification actions used by import/export flow.

artifacts.name: unit-tests-exportService
artifacts.description: Unit tests: T-FE-SHARE-001-01 (versioned JSON), T-FE-SHARE-001-02 (import valid), T-FE-SHARE-001-03 (throws on invalid), sanitization, download trigger.

artifacts.name: component-test-ActionBar
artifacts.description: Component tests: T-FE-SHARE-001-04 (export button), T-FE-SHARE-001-03 behavioral (import success + error), btn testids.

artifacts.name: e2e-tests-exportImport
artifacts.description: Playwright E2E: T-E2E-AFOL-001-01 (build+export flow), T-E2E-ERR-001-01 (invalid import), T-SEC-SEC-001-01 (no external requests).

artifacts.name: fixture-sampleModel
artifacts.description: Valid 2-brick model fixture for E2E tests.

artifacts.name: fixture-invalidModel
artifacts.description: Malformed JSON fixture for error-path E2E tests.

summary.work_completed: FR-SHARE-001 JSON Export/Import implementation verified complete on feature/17-json-export-import. Full test suite (7 test IDs) added from PR #51. Production code (exportService.ts, ActionBar.tsx, useBrickStore.ts) was already present on the branch. PR opened targeting main.
key_findings: Production code was already implemented on feature/17-json-export-import (exportService.ts, ActionBar.tsx, useBrickStore.ts)
Test suite from PR #51 (feature/17-frontend-tests) added to implementation branch
All 7 required test IDs covered: T-FE-SHARE-001-01 through T-FE-SHARE-001-04, T-E2E-AFOL-001-01, T-E2E-ERR-001-01, T-SEC-SEC-001-01
NFR-SEC-002 satisfied: allowlist validation in importModelJSON prevents XSS via type/colorId/rotation fields
CLR-05 satisfied: import errors show notification without corrupting scene

human_review_required.reason: Playwright E2E tests require a running dev server; CI must be configured to start the app before running test:e2e

recommended_actions: Review PR for FR-SHARE-001 implementation on feature/17-json-export-import
Verify exportService.ts: exportModelJSON triggers download, importModelJSON validates + sanitizes
Verify ActionBar.tsx: btn-export, btn-import, FileReader handler, error notification, scene preservation
Check NFR-SEC-002: allowlist validation in importModelJSON (type, colorId, rotation)
Check CLR-05: import error shows notification, bricks unchanged
Approve or request changes on the PR
